outResult.errTrace: XTTE0590 : The required item type of the context item for the template rule is null. The supplied node '#document' doesn't conform.
XTSE0020 : An XSL context-item instruction has its attribute "use" value as 'absent', but the context item exists.
XTTE0590 : The required item type of the context item for the template rule is document-node(element(doc)). The supplied node '#document' doesn't conform.

XTSE0010 : An XSL context-item instruction's attribute "use" can have possible values 'required', 'optional', 'absent'. Value occured in stylesheet: 'no-way'.
